MINI MINUTES: Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appearing specially for Plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set Aug-06-2013 at 10:30 AM in Dept. 610. Proceedings not reported. (610); After hearing, matter ordered off calendar, judgment on file.
